title: broadcast_to_group enqueues offline messages for expelled/left members until next GROUP_SEND
description: ws.rs GROUP_SEND calls list_group_members() to get the member list, then calls broadcast_to_group(). If a member goes offline between the list_group_members() call and the deliver_live() calls, their offline queue correctly receives the message. But if a member left (GROUP_LEAVE) between list_group_members() and enqueue(), broadcast_to_group() enqueues a message for a user who is no longer a group member. The member will receive a group message after they left, with no membership to contextualize it. The member list and the offline-queue write are not atomic.
